Task description explicitly requires 'run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation' and verifier.py checks for sim_file_is_new=true as pass criterion

privileged_info_summary: The 4StoreyBuilding is a real multi-storey commercial office building model sourced from official eQUEST training workbook examples (doe2.com). It contains 5 conditioned middle-floor zones (M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, M.C25) with original DESIGN-COOL-T=75°F and DESIGN-HEAT-T=72°F. The Roof Construction has original ABSORPTANCE=0.6. The task requires implementing two ECMs: (1) Middle floor thermostat reset to 76°F cooling and 71°F heating for all 5 M.* zones, and (2) high-reflectance cool roof with ABSORPTANCE=0.35 (Class A reflective membrane). Both ECMs and a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation are required for task completion.
